function.name: submit_contact_details
function.description: Submit the completed contact-details form. Call this exactly once after populating every required field using only information explicitly stated in the case description.

full_name.description: The person's full name, copied exactly as stated.

date_of_birth.description: The person's date of birth, normalised to YYYY-MM-DD.

email_address.description: The person's email address, copied exactly as stated.

phone_number.description: The person's telephone number, preserving the spacing used in the case description.

address_line_2.description: The secondary address line, such as a flat or apartment.

postcode.description: The postcode, copied exactly as stated.

has_previous_address.description: Whether the person has a previous address to declare.

preferred_contact_method.description: The person's explicitly stated preferred contact method.

preferred_contact_time.description: The person's explicitly stated preferred time for contact.

preferred_language.description: The person's explicitly stated preferred language.

application_contact_consent.description: Whether the person consents to being contacted about this application.

research_contact_consent.description: Whether the person consents to being contacted for research.

declaration_confirmed.description: Whether the person has confirmed that the supplied information is accurate.
